title: Sleep Now, O Sleep Now
content:
Sleep now, O sleep now,
    O you unquiet heart!
    A voice crying �Sleep now�
    Is heard in my heart.

    The voice of the winter
    Is heard at the door.
    O sleep, for the winter
    Is crying �Sleep no more.�

    My kiss will give peace now
    And quiet to your heart,
    Sleep on in peace now,
    O you unquiet heart!
meaning:
This evocative piece by James Joyce, titled "Sleep Now, O Sleep Now", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
